target_en: We played well and we scored.
allowed_variations: We played well and scored,We played good and we scored
coach_note: 두 사건을 and로 자연스럽게 연결하는 기본 패턴

target_en: We were tired so we lost our focus.
allowed_variations: We were tired so we lost focus,We got tired so we lost our focus
coach_note: 원인-결과를 so로 이어주는 인터뷰 표현

target_en: We deserved the three points because we didn't give up.
allowed_variations: We deserved the points because we didn't give up,We deserved 3 points because we never gave up
coach_note: 팀의 노력을 because로 정당화하는 인터뷰 표현

target_en: We were tired but we didn't give up.
allowed_variations: We were tired but we never gave up,We got tired but we kept going
coach_note: 역경과 의지를 대조할 때 but 사용

target_en: When I got the ball, I put a cross in.
allowed_variations: When I received the ball I put a cross in,When I got the ball I crossed it in
coach_note: 공 받고 크로스하는 상황을 when으로 설명

prompt_kr: 공을 잃었을 때 우리 바로 압박했어
target_en: When we lost the ball, we pressed.
allowed_variations: When we lost the ball we pressed high,When we gave the ball away we pressed
coach_note: 공을 잃은 즉시 압박하는 수비 전환 표현

target_en: When we scored, I felt relieved.
allowed_variations: When we scored I was relieved,When we got the goal I felt relieved
coach_note: 득점 후 감정을 when으로 연결하는 인터뷰 표현

target_en: When we conceded, I was frustrated.
allowed_variations: When we conceded I felt frustrated,When they scored I was frustrated
coach_note: 실점 후 감정을 솔직하게 표현하는 인터뷰 표현

target_en: I'll call you when I arrive.
allowed_variations: I'll call you when I get there,I'll ring you when I arrive
focus_point: when + 미래 조건 (will 쓰면 안 됨)
coach_note: when절에서 미래도 현재시제를 쓴다는 점 강조

prompt_kr: 전화 받았을 때 이미 버스 타고 있었어
target_en: I was already on the bus when I got the phone call.
allowed_variations: I was on the bus when I got the call,I was already on the bus when I received the call
coach_note: 두 과거 사건이 겹칠 때 when을 활용하는 패턴

target_en: I feel better when I listen to music.
allowed_variations: I feel better when I'm listening to music,I feel good when I listen to music
coach_note: 현재 일반 사실을 when으로 표현하는 패턴

target_en: As soon as I saw the space, I made a run.
allowed_variations: As soon as I spotted the space I made a run,The moment I saw the space I made a run
coach_note: 공간을 보고 즉시 움직이는 상황을 표현 (기존 d39_01과 동일)

target_en: As soon as we lost the ball, we tried to win it back.
allowed_variations: As soon as we lost it we tried to win it back,The moment we lost the ball we tried to win it back
focus_point: as soon as + 즉각 전환 압박
coach_note: 수비 전환 시 즉각 대응 표현 (기존 d39_02와 동일)

prompt_kr: 피치에 발을 딛는 순간 팬들의 에너지가 느껴졌어
target_en: As soon as I stepped onto the pitch, I felt the energy from the fans.
allowed_variations: As soon as I stepped on the pitch I felt the energy from the fans,The moment I stepped onto the pitch I felt the energy from the fans
coach_note: 경기 시작 순간의 감정을 생생하게 전달하는 인터뷰 표현

target_en: I'll call you as soon as I arrive.
allowed_variations: I'll call you as soon as I get there,I'll ring you as soon as I arrive
focus_point: as soon as vs when 차이 (즉각성 강조)
coach_note: when보다 즉각성이 강한 as soon as 패턴

target_en: I'll text you as soon as I get home.
allowed_variations: I'll message you as soon as I get home,I'll text you as soon as I'm home
key_word: as soon as I get home
focus_point: as soon as + 귀가 후 즉시 행동
coach_note: 귀가 직후 행동을 약속하는 일상 표현

target_en: As soon as I woke up, I checked my phone.
allowed_variations: As soon as I got up I checked my phone,The moment I woke up I checked my phone
focus_point: as soon as + 과거 즉각 행동
coach_note: 기상 직후 행동을 as soon as로 표현

target_en: I will call you back as soon as possible.
allowed_variations: I'll call you back as soon as possible,I'll get back to you as soon as possible
coach_note: 공식·비공식 상황 모두 쓰이는 매우 실용적인 표현

target_en: I'll finish it as soon as possible.
allowed_variations: I'll get it done as soon as possible,I'll complete it as soon as possible
coach_note: finish 외에 get it done / complete it 등 다양하게 활용

target_en: After the game, we spoke in the dressing room.
allowed_variations: After the match we spoke in the dressing room,After the game we talked in the changing room
coach_note: 경기 후 팀 분위기를 전달하는 인터뷰 표현

prompt_kr: 10분 지나고 안정되면서 해볼 수 있겠다 싶었어
target_en: After 10 minutes, we settled down and felt like we could have a go.
allowed_variations: After the first 10 minutes we settled and felt we could have a go,Once we settled down we thought we could have a go
coach_note: 경기 흐름 전환점을 설명하는 인터뷰 표현 (기존 d39_06과 동일)

prompt_kr: 일 끝나고 영화 보러 갈 거야
target_en: I'm going to go to the movies after work.
allowed_variations: I'm going to the cinema after work,I'll go to the movies after work
coach_note: after 뒤에 명사가 바로 오는 가장 기본적인 패턴

target_en: I have some time after the meeting.
allowed_variations: I've got some time after the meeting,I have time after the meeting
coach_note: 일정 후 여유를 간단히 표현하는 패턴

prompt_kr: 훈련 끝나고 영화 보러 갈 거야
target_en: I'm going to go to the movies after training.
allowed_variations: I'll go to the cinema after training,I'm going to the movies after training
coach_note: 선수 일상과 연결되는 after 사용 예시

target_en: I'm going to take a shower before bed.
allowed_variations: I'm going to shower before bed,I'll take a shower before I go to bed
coach_note: before + 명사로 간단하게 쓰는 패턴

prompt_kr: 저녁 먹기 전에 달리기 할 거야
target_en: I'm going to go for a run before dinner.
allowed_variations: I'm going for a run before dinner,I'll go for a run before dinner
coach_note: before + meal/event 명사 패턴

target_en: Do you want to go for a walk before training?
allowed_variations: Do you want to go for a walk before the training,Do you fancy a walk before training
coach_note: Do you want to...? + before 제안 패턴

prompt_kr: 아침에 나가기 전에 항상 날씨 확인해
target_en: I always check the weather before I leave in the morning.
allowed_variations: I always check the weather before leaving in the morning,I always look at the weather before I leave in the morning
coach_note: before 뒤에 절이 오는 경우 — before + noun vs before + clause 구분 포인트
